name: Beets in Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can beets, drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 1 quart glass casserole dish.
2. Stir gently to mix.
3. Microwave, covered, for 3-5 minutes on High, or until heated through. Stir every 2 minutes.
4. Let stand, covered, for 2-3 minutes before serving.
